sections.heading:
AI That Works For You,
Not Against You.
sections.subheading: Deploy safe, secure AI agents in minutes. No engineering team needed. Works the way your business actually works — whether you're an accounting firm, law practice, or any other professional service.

sections.heading: Why Choose OpenClaw Agents
sections.subheading: Built for businesses that demand reliability.

items.title: Instant & Secure Deployment
items.description: Launch AI agents in sandboxed containers in seconds. Enterprise-grade security without the complexity. Your data stays safe. Your workflows stay protected.

items.title: Real Business Results
items.description: Automate the work that eats your time. Save hours every week. Cut costs immediately. Your team focuses on what matters — building client relationships, not doing busywork.

items.title: No AI Expertise Needed
items.description: Simple setup for traditional businesses. You don't need to understand AI. Just describe what you want automated. We handle the rest.

sections.heading: Trusted by Professional Firms

items.quote: We automated document review. What used to take our team 3 days now happens overnight. Freed up two people for billable work.

sections.heading: 🚀 Transform Your Team in 7 Days
sections.description: Join 500+ firms already saving 15+ hours per week. Get your first agent deployed, tested, and live — with zero engineering overhead. Money-back guarantee if you don't see results.

items.question: How secure is this? Can I trust it with client data?
items.answer: Absolutely. OpenClaw agents run in isolated sandboxed containers with HIPAA and SOC 2 compliance ready. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit, never leaves your environment, and you maintain full control. Security audits available on request.

items.question: What can I automate? Give me real examples.
items.answer: Document review & extraction, client intake forms, meeting scheduling, invoice processing, contract analysis, email routing & summarization, compliance checks, and data migration. Nearly 80% of manual office work can be automated. Our team will audit your firm for quick wins.

items.question: How long until I see ROI?
items.answer: Most firms see measurable results in 14 days. Average client saves 2-3 team members' worth of work per week. At typical billable rates, that's $50K-100K annually. We show ROI math before you commit.

items.question: What if it makes a mistake?
items.answer: OpenClaw agents are built for accountability, not guessing. They work in restricted lanes — validate rules you set, catch errors before they happen, and escalate to humans when uncertain. You stay in control. We've automated thousands of tasks with 99.2% accuracy.

items.question: Do I really not need engineers?
items.answer: Correct. No code, no technical staff required. Describe your workflow in plain English. Our platform builds the agent. Your team gets trained in 30 minutes. If you can write an email explaining a process, we can automate it.

items.question: What's the catch?
items.answer: No catch. We charge for usage after 30-day free trial. Simple pricing, transparent costs, cancel anytime. We win when you see value and stay. If you don't see results, we refund it — we're that confident.
